Aviator Silhouette: A retro aviator with a distinctive top bar and serious character. Lightweight with sturdy hinges — comfortable all day, no pinching, no slipping.
Style That Travels: Marinas, mountain passes, and anywhere with a view worth protecting. Brown/Purple for depth, Green for heritage, Tortoise/Rose for the soft twist.
Protective Case Included: Every pair ships with a carrying case — protected in the bag, ready on your face.
The Jaxy Promise: Designed in-house, quality-checked twice. Style this good shouldn't require a designer price tag.
description:
The Captain brings retro aviator character in spades: a distinctive top bar and bold silhouette that stand out from the standard-issue pilot look. These aviator sunglasses are for men and women alike, with a fit that stays comfortable from first coffee to last light — lightweight on the face, steady on the move, and easy to love in any season.

The polarized lenses do the quiet work: glare from windshields, water, and pavement is filtered out so colors stay rich and your eyes stay relaxed on the brightest days. No squinting contest — just crisp, comfortable clarity wherever the afternoon takes you. Choose Brown/Purple for depth, Green for heritage, Tortoise/Rose for the soft twist. However you wear them, the aviator profile keeps the look intentional, and the included carrying case keeps them safe between wears.

Captain by Jaxy: take the helm. Real polarized lenses, a considered fit, and a silhouette that earns its spot in the everyday rotation.
